title: Carney Says That Canada’s Support for Airstrikes Came ‘With Regret’
summary_full: The prime minister criticized Israel and the U.S. for not consulting other nations or the U.N. before their attack on Iran.
summary_public: The prime minister criticized Israel and the U.S. for not consulting other nations or the U.N. before their attack on Iran.
